content:
::ARCHIVE_ENTRY_002

Title: What the Thing Actually Is
Ref ID: EXP_JESSICA_02_system_identity
Folder: /GPT_ARCHIVE_CORE/THREAD_REVIVALS/EXPLANATORY/
Filename: EXP_JESSICA_02_system_identity.md

Prompt:
well can you also explain the thing itself

Response:
Okay, so the thing itself is basically a custom creative system—a personal operating system for how I build, organize, and grow all my projects across art, writing, teaching, tech, etc.

Right now, I’m moving everything I’ve been sketching and experimenting with into a more structured, living archive. From there, I can keep iterating, but with more clarity and flow. I’m using platforms like GitHub not just for coding, but to track my process and make it public—like a behind-the-scenes of how I work, which doubles as a portfolio.
